name: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez
title: BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez | Bacardi 10 Year Old Rum | Extra Dark Gold Rum | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: Barrel-aged for a minimum of 10 years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez balances fruity flavors with classic vanilla.
marketing_description: Expertly blended. Barrel-aged for a minimum of ten years under the Caribbean sun. Then filtered through charcoal for a smooth finish. 'Diez' refers to this delectable sipping rum’s ten-year aging process.
tasting_notes: Discover bright notes of stone fruits, banana and pear balanced with caramelized vanilla and oak.
process: Expertly blended. Barrel-aged for a minimum of ten years under the Caribbean sun. Then filtered through charcoal for a smooth finish.
how_to_serve: This rum is described as a sipping rum.

faq_items.question: What is aged rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavour and mouthfeel.

faq_items.question: How long is BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez aged for?
faq_items.answer: This rum is aged for at least 10 years.

faq_items.question: What is the difference between dark, gold and white rum?
faq_items.answer: Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Colour can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavours that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But colour can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself.
